title: thelypteris sambasensis
intro: Thelypteris sambasensis, also known as Sambas fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae, native to Borneo. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Thelypteris sambasensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves can be used to make teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
